title: Simply FPS
description: A minimal, lightweight modpack focused entirely on boosting FPS for Minecraft with no Bloat
body:
# 🎮 Simply FPS - Fabric Edition

> A minimal, lightweight modpack focused **entirely on boosting FPS** for Minecraft with no Bloat.

**Simply FPS** is a plug-and-play Fabric-based modpack that uses **only 10 carefully selected mods** to drastically improve Minecraft’s performance — all without changing gameplay mechanics or visuals too much.

---

## ✅ Features

- 🚀 **Significant FPS Boost** (up to +300% on low-end PCs)
- 🧠 Smart chunk loading and faster world generation
- ✨ Smooth animations and reduced microstutters
- 🔧 In-game video settings via Mod Menu
- 🎮 Lightweight: less than 20 MB total mod size

---

## 📈 Estimated FPS Gains

| Hardware Tier       | Vanilla FPS | Simply FPS | % Improvement |
|---------------------|-------------|------------|---------------|
| 🔻 Low-End Laptop   | 30–50 FPS   | 100–150 FPS| +200–300%     |
| ⚙️ Mid-Range PC     | 80–120 FPS  | 250–300 FPS| +150–250%     |
| 💻 High-End Machine | 200+ FPS    | 400–600 FPS| +100–200%     |

> *Actual results may vary depending on hardware, mods, shaders, and resolution.*

---

## 🧩 Included Mods

| Mod                         | Purpose                                      |
|----------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| ⚙️ Cloth Config API         | Required library                             |
| 🧠 Concurrent Chunk Management (C2ME) | Optimizes chunk loading & multithreading |
| 🧵 Fabric API               | Core Fabric library                          |
| ⚡ ImmediatelyFast          | Reduces microstutters and GPU bottlenecks    |
| 🌈 Iris Shaders            | Optional shaders with performance tuning     |
| 📑 Mod Menu                | Easy mod configuration UI                    |
| 🧰 Reese's Sodium Options  | Enhanced Sodium settings interface           |
| 🧪 Sodium                   | Main FPS optimization engine                 |
| ⚡ Sodium Extra             | Adds extended control over performance       |
| 👥 Very Many Players (VMP) | Optimizes multiplayer thread performance     |

---

## 🧠 Recommendations

- Turn off smooth lighting
- Set render distance to 6–12
- Use fast graphics
- Disable vsync and clouds

---

🎯 **Goal**: Boost FPS. Stay Vanilla. Zero bloat.

---
